projectDescription: A small, production-ready, isomorphic Haskell front-end web framework inspired by Elm and React, supporting virtual DOM, component composition, type-safe routing, and compilation to WebAssembly and JavaScript.
keyFeatures: Virtual DOM with recursive diffing and patching algorithm
React-style component composition with type-safe parent-child bindings
Compilation to WebAssembly and JavaScript via GHC backends
Extensible subscription-based subsystem (keyboard, mouse, history, websockets)
Isomorphic rendering with server-side rendering (SSR) and hydration support
Hot reload via WASM browser mode with ghciwatch
Native mobile support via LynxJS (iOS, Android, HarmonyOS)
100% test coverage on the core DOM diff engine
publicApiSurface: component / vcomp — smart constructor for building Components
startApp — launch a top-level App with event delegation
miso — hydrate a pre-rendered server-side page
Effect / io / io_ / sync / sync_ / batch / issue / withSink — effect scheduling
View / node / text / textRaw / textKey — virtual DOM construction
App / Component / SomeComponent — core application types
(+>) / mount_ — component mounting combinators
Miso.Html / Miso.Html.Element / Miso.Html.Property / Miso.Html.Event — HTML DSL
Miso.Router — type-safe servant-style routing
Miso.Fetch — HTTP Fetch API (getJSON, postJSON, getText, etc.)
Miso.Subscription.History / Keyboard / Mouse / Window / OnLine — subscriptions
Miso.Svg / Miso.Mathml / Miso.Canvas — graphics modules
Miso.WebSocket — WebSocket support
Miso.Storage — browser localStorage/sessionStorage
Miso.Lens — lenses and stateful operators for model updates
Miso.String / MisoString / ms / toMisoString — string utilities
Miso.CSS / Miso.CSS.Color / Miso.CSS.Types — typed CSS
Miso.PubSub — publish-subscribe for component communication
Miso.EventSource — Server-Sent Events (SSE)
Miso.Html.Render — server-side HTML rendering
